qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. in Materials/Metallurgical Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Engineering Chemistry or equivalent with minimum 60% marks or M.Tech./M.Sc. in Materials/Metallurgical Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Chemistry or equivalent with minimum 60% marks.
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (PA-I): B.Tech. in Materials/Metallurgical Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Engineering Chemistry or equivalent with a minimum of 60% marks, OR M.Tech./M.Sc. in Materials/Metallurgical Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Chemistry or equivalent with a minimum of 60% marks. Candidates with experience in extractive metallurgy, hydrometallurgy, electrochemistry, waste valorisation, solution chemistry, and characterization techniques are preferred.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- p.m. + HRA (with valid GATE) Rs. 30,000/- p.m. + HRA (without GATE)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Mandi Project Associate-I (PA-I) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Mandi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Mandi Project Associate-I (PA-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate-I (PA-I) position at IIT Mandi is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-I (PA-I) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech. degree in specific engineering fields or an M.Tech./M.Sc. degree in relevant disciplines with at least 60% marks. Experience in certain metallurgy and chemistry areas is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the provided information, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I (PA-I) position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, plus HRA. The exact amount depends on whether the candidate possesses a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I (PA-I) role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience for the interview stage.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Associate-I (PA-I) position at IIT Mandi is contractual.

faq.question: Q7. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi).

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is IITM/ANRF/NSh/533.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for details on age limits and relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Mandi or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date of application.
